prompt: 我的 fork 的 main 上已经有一些自己的提交，现在 upstream/main 又更新了。我不想丢失自己的修改，也不想把历史搞得太乱。现在最稳妥的同步步骤是什么？
assertions: Uses git fetch upstream followed by git merge upstream/main while on local main as the default safe path.
Mentions checking for a clean worktree before syncing or tells the user to commit or stash pending changes.
Does not recommend force-pushing main as the default solution.
